---
title: "03_DataAnalysisALS"
author: "Sushant Agellu"
date: "2026-03-31"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
```



```{r}

# Loading the Data 
gse_id <- "GSE60424"

metadata <- fread(file.path("..", "01_DataCleaning", paste0(gse_id, "_metadata_clean.csv")))
counts <- fread(file.path("..", "01_DataCleaning", paste0(gse_id, "_counts_clean.csv")))

dim(metadata)
dim(counts)
```



### For ALS DataAnalaysis Part

```{r}
# Keep only Healthy Control and ALS
metadata_sub <- metadata %>%
  filter(diseasestatus_ch1 %in% c("Healthy Control", "ALS"))

table(metadata_sub$diseasestatus_ch1)
dim(metadata_sub)

# sample names in metadata are in the title column
metadata_sub$sample <- metadata_sub$title

# keep only count columns for those samples
keep_samples <- metadata_sub$sample
counts_sub <- counts[, c("gene_id", keep_samples), with = FALSE]

# make count matrix
count_matrix <- as.data.frame(counts_sub)
rownames(count_matrix) <- count_matrix$gene_id
count_matrix$gene_id <- NULL
count_matrix <- as.matrix(count_matrix)

# reorder metadata to match count matrix
metadata_sub <- metadata_sub[match(colnames(count_matrix), metadata_sub$sample), ]

# check
all(colnames(count_matrix) == metadata_sub$sample)

# set factor levels
metadata_sub$diseasestatus_ch1 <- factor(
  metadata_sub$diseasestatus_ch1,
  levels = c("Healthy Control", "ALS")
)

table(metadata_sub$diseasestatus_ch1)

# create DESeq2 dataset
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = count_matrix,
  colData = metadata_sub,
  design = ~ diseasestatus_ch1
)

# filter low-count genes
dds <- dds[rowSums(counts(dds)) > 10, ]

# run DESeq2
dds <- DESeq(dds)

# get ALS vs Healthy results
res <- results(dds, contrast = c("diseasestatus_ch1", "ALS", "Healthy Control"))

res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
res_df$gene_id <- rownames(res_df)

head(res_df)
summary(res)

# save results
write.csv(res_df, "GSE60424_ALS_vs_Healthy_DESeq2_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```




# MA Plot For ALS
```{r}
plotMA(res, main = "MA Plot: ALS vs Healthy", ylim = c(-5, 5))
```

#Volcano Plot for ALS
```{r}
res_df$significant <- ifelse(res_df$padj < 0.05, "Yes", "No")

ggplot(res_df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = significant)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Volcano Plot: ALS vs Healthy")
```

##HeatMap For ALS
```{r}
library(pheatmap)

top_genes <- res_df %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  pull(gene_id)

heat_data <- count_matrix[top_genes, ]

pheatmap(log2(heat_data + 1),
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE)
```
